# Checkpoint Descriptions | What Students See Each Day

<callout icon="📋" color="green_bg">
	**CHECKPOINT DESCRIPTIONS** | The exact task members see each day. The community manager posts the matching one into each daily checkpoint. | 30 min a day | All times SGT
</callout>

<callout icon="🚨" color="red_bg">
	**Gate days (Day 8 and Day 14) are required.** Miss either and the member drops off the graduation and competition track. Say so in the post.
</callout>

<table fit-page-width="true" header-row="true">
<tr color="blue_bg"><td>Day</td><td>Date (SGT)</td><td>What to do</td><td>Post in</td></tr>
<tr><td>1</td><td>Sun Jun 21</td><td>Join the community, create a Claude Project named "My Marketing Agent," and post a hello with what you sell. (10 min)</td><td>#Day1</td></tr>
<tr><td>2</td><td>Mon Jun 22</td><td>Paste Template 1 into your Project, then write your business in 3 sentences: what you sell, who it is for, what makes it different. (15 min)</td><td>#Day2</td></tr>
<tr color="orange_bg"><td>3 (graded)</td><td>Tue Jun 23</td><td>Paste Template 2 and fill your business profile: product, price, the one differentiator, the result, your channels. (25 min)</td><td>#Day3</td></tr>
<tr><td>4</td><td>Wed Jun 24</td><td>Paste Template 3 and add your ideal customer: who they are, their main problem, where they hang out, the words they use. (25 min)</td><td>#Day4</td></tr>
<tr><td>5</td><td>Thu Jun 25</td><td>Paste Template 4, add 2 to 3 writing samples and your voice rules, then ask the agent to write one line in your voice. (20 min)</td><td>#Day5</td></tr>
<tr color="orange_bg"><td>6 (graded)</td><td>Fri Jun 26</td><td>Paste Template 5 (the idea engine), run it once, and post the idea it gave you. This is your first working agent. (30 min)</td><td>#Day6</td></tr>
<tr><td>7</td><td>Sat Jun 27</td><td>Run the idea engine 3 times, pick the one you would actually post, and post your favorite. (20 min)</td><td>#Day7</td></tr>
<tr color="red_bg"><td>8 (GATE)</td><td>Sun Jun 28</td><td>Record a 2-minute phone video: show your agent make one idea, then say your biggest blocker. No editing. Post by 11:59pm. Required to qualify. (5 min)</td><td>#Day8</td></tr>
<tr><td>9</td><td>Mon Jun 29</td><td>Paste Template 6, add the step that turns an idea into a ready-to-run prompt, and post the idea plus its prompt. (25 min)</td><td>#Day9</td></tr>
<tr color="orange_bg"><td>10 (graded)</td><td>Tue Jun 30</td><td>Paste Template 7 and make your agent output one idea in 3 formats: a post, a reel script, a caption. Post all three. (30 min)</td><td>#Day10</td></tr>
<tr><td>11</td><td>Wed Jul 1</td><td>Paste Template 8 and set the "today's idea" routine so your agent delivers automatically. Post the first result. (25 min)</td><td>#Day11</td></tr>
<tr color="orange_bg"><td>12 (graded)</td><td>Thu Jul 2</td><td>Find one generic idea and tighten your instructions so every idea names your product or customer. Post a before and after. (25 min)</td><td>#Day12</td></tr>
<tr><td>13</td><td>Fri Jul 3</td><td>Run your agent 7 times in one sitting, read a full week of ideas, and post your favorite. (25 min)</td><td>#Day13</td></tr>
<tr color="red_bg"><td>14 (GATE)</td><td>Sat Jul 4</td><td>Submit 3 things in 3 separate boxes by 11:59pm: your agent (a link or 60 to 90 sec recording), your one-page brief, one demo idea and prompt. This is your competition entry. (30 min)</td><td>#Day14</td></tr>
<tr color="purple_bg"><td>15</td><td>Sun Jul 5</td><td>Post the best idea your agent has given you. You graduated. Get ready for the Summit on Wed Jul 8. (10 min)</td><td>#Day15</td></tr>
</table>

---
*Each task maps to a template in Agent Templates and a lesson in the Host Guide. AI SCHOOL. NAS.com. CONFIDENTIAL.*
